items.title: PEP 517 — A build-system independent format for source trees
items.note: Defines how front-ends (pip) call back-ends (setuptools/hatch/...). The foundation of modern Python packaging.

items.title: PEP 518 — Specifying minimum build system requirements
PEP 621 — Storing project metadata in `pyproject.toml`
items.note: Standardises the `[project]` table that every backend reads.

items.title: Python Packaging User Guide — Writing your `pyproject.toml`
items.note: Practical, up-to-date guide with examples for the most common backends.

items.title: PyPA — `python -m build`
items.note: The reference build front-end; the right way to produce wheels + sdists locally.

items.title: Hatch — Project configuration
items.note: How a modern backend layers on top of standard `pyproject.toml`.
